questions.question: Who is the Chairperson of the Start-up Advisory Council, constituted recently?
questions.explanation: The Start-up Advisory Council was notified in January 2020, which aims to advise the Government to nurture innovation and start-ups in the country. It is chaired by the Commerce and Industry Minister.The Centre has recently nominated 28 non-official members for the Start-up Advisory Council notified last year, including the founders of top start-up firms in the country including Byju’s, Urban Company, Snapdeal and Ola Cabs.

questions.question: The Cabinet approved the MoU between India and which country in Solar Energy sector?
questions.explanation: The Union cabinet approved the signing of a memorandum of understanding (MoU) between India and Uzbekistan for solar energy cooperation.Under the MoU, the two countries will identify research and pilot projects in fields such as solar photovoltaic, storage technologies and technology transfer. National Institute of Solar Energy (NISE), Ministry of New & Renewable Energy is involved in the projects.

questions.question: Which country has decided to pause oil and gas leasing in Alaska’s Arctic National Wildlife Refuge?
questions.explanation: The new US administration headed by Joe Biden has announced its plans to halt temporarily its oil and gas leasing in Alaska’s Arctic National Wildlife Refuge. The preceding administration headed by Trump had issued leases in this region which is considered sacred by Indigenous Gwich’in.Gwichʼin are an Athabaskan language speaking people of Canada and Alaska. They live in the northwestern part of North America close to the Arctic circle.

questions.question: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) proposed a four-tier regulatory framework for which type of financial institutions?
questions.explanation: Reserve Bank of India recently released a discussion paper on revised regulatory framework for Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs).As per the paper, the regulatory and supervisory framework of NBFCs shall be based on a four-layered structure namely Base Layer, Middle Layer, Upper Layer and a possible Top Layer. RBI also recommended more power for the NBFC Boards on capital and risk management.

questions.question: ‘Ooceraea joshii’, is an Ant species recently discovered in which state?
questions.explanation: Two new species of a rare ant genus have been recently discovered in Kerala and Tamil Nadu by a team of scientists from Punjabi University.One of the two species which was discovered found in the Periyar Tiger Reserve of Kerala has been named Ooceraea Joshii, to honour the veteran biologist ‘Amitabh Joshi’.

questions.question: “Operation Sard Hawa”, which was making news recently, was organised by which organisation?
questions.explanation: Border Security Force (BSF) organises the Operation “Garam Hawa” in summer season and operation “Sard Hawa” during the winter season every year.BSF has recently launched “Operation Sard Hawa” of this year, under which it aims to increase security on the borders in Jaisalmer, Rajasthan. This operation was scheduled from January 21 to 27, coinciding with the Republic Day.

questions.question: Which country proposed a five-year extension of New START Treaty with Russia?
questions.explanation: US President Joe Biden has recently proposed a five-year extension of New START Treaty with Russia.The treaty limited the United States and Russia to 1,550 nuclear warheads each. It expires on February 5 this year since the former President Donald Trump stopped negotiations and tried to include China in the treaty.

questions.question: Which Ministry has launched a National Migration Support Portal named “ShramShakti”?

options.label: C
options.text: Union Ministry of women and child welfare

questions.explanation: The Union Ministry of Tribal Affairs has launched a dedicated portal that would help in formulation of state and national-level programme for migrant workers. The portal is named ‘ShramShakti’ and was launched by the Union Tribal Affairs Minister at Goa. He also launched a training manual for the migrant workers named ShramSaathi.

questions.question: Which organization has issued Purple Notice to member countries against investment frauds via dating applications?
questions.explanation: The Interpol has issued “Purple Notice” to all its member countries. The notice warns all the member countries against investment frauds via dating applications.It has been stated that artificial romance is established with users of the apps in the initial stages and once a certain level of trust is achieved, criminals encourage users to join ponzi investment schemes.

questions.question: ‘Udyam Sarathi’ and ‘Abhyudaya’ are the initiatives of which Indian state/UT?
questions.explanation: The Chief Minister of Uttar Pradesh has recently launched a mobile app named ‘Udyam Sarathi’ for seeking employment, as a part of the 3-day event marking UP DIWAS.The state also announced the proposal to launch ‘Abhyudaya’ coaching centres, which would benefit the students who are preparing for various competitive examinations.
